summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical is present or intended; each hydrated candidate was classified independently from the preflight artifact. No security-sensitive items were detected, no close actions are allowed by the current low-signal/instant-close gates, and merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked by job frontmatter.
